titleStmt.title: SII 40.69: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 69. (A.R. No. B. 47 of 1930.) Dāchēpalle, Palnad Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a stone set up in front of the Nāgēśvara temple in the village.
This is dated Śaka 1135, Śrīmukha, Vaiśākha, ba. 5, Thursday, corresponding to 1218 A.D., May 11. However the week day was Saturday.

Damaged. Seems to register the grant of half of the village Dāchēpalli to the temple of Muktīśvara by Viṁlavikramāditya and Kāma-Nāyaka for the merit of their father Mahāpradhāni Bhīma-Nāyaka. Mentions Gaṇapatidēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī śubhaśakavaruṣaṁbulu 1135
śrīmukha saṁvatsara vaiśākha bahuḷa paṁcami gu
ruvāramuna svasti samasta guṇa vibhūṣaṇa mridu
madhurabhāṣaṇa Anēka maṇimakhitācaraṇa jaladēri
puravarādhīśvara vīralakṣmīnijēśvara Ayyana siṁha sāhasō
ttuṁga kāminīmanasarōvara rājahaṁssa baṁduja
na kalpavrikṣapratyakṣa yudhiṣṭhira satṛrādēya śauca gā
ṁgēya nuḍidaṁtta gaṁḍa gaṁḍabhēruṁḍa mā¨rccāla bhīma
raṇaraṁga rāmatyāganārā¨rjju sū¨ryyavaṁśa pratiṣṭhācā
¨ryya nāyakācā¨ryya nā cāṇakya kaṁcī cūrakāṟa
Aruvēladūṣaka tiśaraṇāgatavajrapaṁjjara bīḍigera
kṣāpālaka bhīḍigaramunnīṟu ni balamettugaṁḍa
śrītripurāṁttakadēvara divya śrīpādapadmārādhaka parabalasā
dhaka samasta praśasti sahitaṁ . śrīmanmahāpradhāni
talava bhīmanāyakula koḍkulu viṁlavikramādityuṁ
ḍu dilīpanāyaka maṁdāḍi kāmanāyakulu tamataṁḍri śivalō
ka prāptuṁḍayinaṭlugā dācēpalli catusīmamunaṁdu A¨rddhamu
śrīmuktīśvaradēvarakiccitimi Ācaṁdrā¨rkkasthāyigānu maṁga
Idi gaṇapatidēva mahārā
svadattaṁ dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānupālanaṁ
paradattāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt . svadattaṁ pa
radattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharā ṣaṣṭiva¨rṣasahasrāṇi
viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi muktisvaramu bhīmajiyavritti
Digital edition of SII 40.69 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
